soloConfig.description: Checks project config and per-set overrides to determine if solo mode is active

soloRegistryEntry.signature: Virtual registry entry: { path: '.', branch: currentBranch, solo: true }
soloRegistryEntry.description: Registry entries for solo sets that point to the working directory instead of a worktree

soloLifecycle.signature: Solo-aware start-set, execute-set, merge, status, cleanup handlers
soloLifecycle.description: All lifecycle commands check solo flag and skip worktree/merge operations when active

commandHandlers.description: Split command files where solo mode checks are inserted

soloSkipsWorktree.description: In solo mode, start-set must not create a worktree or branch -- work happens on main

soloMergeNoOp.description: Running /merge on a solo set must return success with informational message, not error

soloPreservesLifecycle.description: Solo mode must preserve discuss, plan, execute, and review steps -- only isolation changes

soloStatusVisible.description: /status must visibly indicate when a set or project is in solo mode
